summary: The diff addresses REQ-14 by modifying backend Motoko code and multiple frontend TypeScript files to fix compilation and deployment errors. The backend main.mo is updated with correct imports and type definitions. Frontend components and hooks are updated with correct TypeScript types (discriminated union objects, bigint usage, enum imports). No files were removed, and all previously implemented features appear preserved. The changes are consistent with fixing deployment errors rather than adding new features.

missing_requirements.requirement: The migration module compiles and is compatible with the current actor state
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no changes to migration.mo (or any migration module file). The build request specifically calls out migration.mo as needing to compile without errors and be compatible with the current actor state, but no migration file appears in the modified files list.
